# The Herb Garden Council — Allocated Score / STAR-PR, 3 seats (each quota seats someone)

*Generated from [`07b_c5_b36_herb-council-pr-3-seats.yaml`](../07b_c5_b36_herb-council-pr-3-seats.yaml) — do not edit by hand. Regenerate: `python STARVote_LH_tabulation_engine/tools_adam/scripts/build_yaml_pages.py`.*

**Method:** [Allocated Score (proportional STAR)](../../../../00_start_here/proportional_representation) · **3 seats** · **Expected winners:** Anise, Basil, Chive

## Scenario

One garden, 36 ballots, three seats - and TWO philosophies of 'three
winners'. This is a same-ballots TWIN PAIR: file 07a tabulates Bloc STAR
(single-winner STAR run once per seat - a cohesive majority can take every
seat), file 07b tabulates Allocated Score / STAR-PR on the IDENTICAL rows
(each Hare quota of voters fills one seat, ballots spent on a winner are
reweighted). A kitchen bloc slates Basil-Chive-Dill; a tea caucus backs
Anise & Endive. Same opinions, same styles, same rows - different method,
different council.

The electorate (36 ballots, all individual rows):
  - kitchen bloc: 20 voters (10 slate, 4 bullet, 4 nuanced, 2 gentle)
  - tea caucus: 16 voters (9 nuanced, 4 slate, 3 cliff35)

Ballot styles in play (taxonomy: 00_start_here/STAR_Voting/
STAR_ballot_voting_styles.md):
  - nuanced: full 0-5 range, honest gaps, ties allowed
  - bullet: choose-one transplant: favorite 5, rest 0/blank
  - slate: partisan slate: equal 5s for the in-group, 0 outside
  - gentle: gentle soul: everything squeezed into 3-5, no zeros
  - cliff35: cliff ballot: 0 or 3-5, nothing in between

What the frozen seed produced: Seats: Anise, Basil, Chive. kitchen bloc
seats 2 of its 3-name slate; tea caucus seats 1 of its 2-name slate. Final
seat round (reweighted totals): Chive 35.58 vs Dill 33.38.

TWIN FILE (identical ballots, other method):
07a_c5_b36_herb-council-bloc-3-seats.yaml tabulates Bloc STAR and seats
Basil, Chive, Dill.

RANDOM-BUT-HUMAN, reproducible: generated by
06_Other/ballot_style_lab/generate_ballot_styles.py (scenario
'herb_council', seed 57) - utilities sampled from the faction model above,
then rendered through each voter's ballot style. Per
00_start_here/topics/simulate_utilities_not_ballots.md this is the
'stress-test the tabulator' job (with human-shaped renderings), not a
method-welfare comparison. Regenerate byte-identically: python
generate_ballot_styles.py --emit herb_council

## Ballots

Row 1 = candidate names; each later row is one voter's 0–5 scores (a `N ×` prefix = N identical ballots).

Markers on these ballots: `-` blank · `~` race abstention · `&` candidate abstention · `?` spoiled · `%` spoiled+reissued — all tabulate as 0 (reported honestly).

```text
Anise, Basil, Chive, Dill, Endive
    5,     0,     2,    1,      4
    0,     5,     0,    0,      0
    5,     0,     0,    0,      5

    5,     1,     1,    0,      4
    -,     5,     5,    5,      -
    5,     0,     0,    0,      5
    5,     0,     0,    0,      5
    -,     5,     -,    -,      -
    0,     5,     5,    5,      0

    0,     5,     5,    5,      0

    5,     0,     0,    1,      5
```

## What the engine says

The count, step by step — the rounds and how the winner is reached:

```text
--- Allocated Score Voting Method (3 winners) ---

[Allocated Score Voting]
 Tabulating 36 ballots to fill 3 seats.
Count × Anise,Basil,Chive,Dill,Endive
    7 ×     0,    5,    5,   5,     0
    6 ×     5,    0,    0,   0,     5
    4 ×     -,    5,    5,   5,     -
    3 ×     -,    5,    -,   -,     -
    1 ×     5,    0,    2,   1,     4
    1 ×     0,    5,    0,   0,     0
    1 ×     0,    5,    3,   4,     0
    1 ×     5,    1,    0,   1,     4
    1 ×     3,    5,    5,   5,     3
    1 ×     5,    1,    1,   0,     4
    1 ×     4,    0,    2,   1,     5
    1 ×     5,    0,    1,   2,     4
    1 ×     3,    5,    5,   4,     3
    1 ×     3,    0,    2,   1,     5
    1 ×     0,    5,    5,   4,     0
    1 ×     5,    1,    1,   0,     3
    1 ×     0,    5,    5,   3,     0
    1 ×     5,    -,    -,   -,     5
    1 ×     5,    0,    0,   1,     5
    1 ×     4,    0,    0,   1,     5
  ('-' = left blank / abstained; '0' = scored zero — both count as 0 stars.)

[Allocated Score Voting: Round 1]
 The highest-scoring candidate wins a seat.
   Basil         -- 103 -- First place
   Chive         --  87
   Dill          --  83
   Anise         --  82
   Endive        --  80
 Basil wins a seat.

[Allocated Score Voting: Round 1: Ballot allocation round]
 Allocating 12 ballots.

[Allocated Score Voting: Round 1: Ballot allocation round: Round 1]
 Allocating 20 ballots at score 5.
 This allocation overfills the quota.  Returning fractional surplus.
 Allocating only 60.00% of these ballots.
 Keeping these ballots, but multiplying their weights by 2/5.
 20 ballots reweighted from 1 to 2/5.

[Allocated Score Voting: Round 2]
 The highest-scoring candidate wins a seat.
   Anise         -- 78+2/5 -- First place
   Endive        -- 76+2/5
   Chive         -- 40+1/5
   Dill          -- 38
 Anise wins a seat.

[Allocated Score Voting: Round 2: Ballot allocation round]
 Allocating 12 ballots.

[Allocated Score Voting: Round 2: Ballot allocation round: Round 1]
 Allocating 13 ballots at score 5.
 This allocation overfills the quota.  Returning fractional surplus.
 Allocating only 92.31% of these ballots.
 Keeping these ballots, but multiplying their weights by 1/13.
 13 ballots reweighted from 1 to 1/13.

[Allocated Score Voting: Round 3]
 The highest-scoring candidate wins a seat.
   Chive         -- 35+38/65 -- First place
   Dill          -- 33+ 5/13
   Endive        -- 21+61/65
 Chive wins a seat.

[Allocated Score Voting: Winners — Allocated Score Voting Method (3 winners)]
 Anise
 Basil
 Chive
```

```text
Head-to-head / pairwise comparison

        * indicates Top 2 Finalist

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

       * Chive > | 16 -  4 - 16 | 4 - 26 -  6 |    ---      | 8 - 23 -  5 |16 -  4 - 16 |
          Dill > | 16 -  4 - 16 | 6 - 20 - 10 | 5 - 23 -  8 |    ---      |16 -  4 - 16 |
        Endive > |  3 - 28 -  5 |16 -  0 - 20 |16 -  4 - 16 |16 -  4 - 16 |    ---      |

  Condorcet Winner: Basil — matches the STAR winner

                   Score

 Hare quota is 12.
```
